summary.current_north_star_alignment: Lead -> Audit -> Product Route -> Proposal -> Checkout -> Verified Payment -> Packet -> Fulfillment -> Proof -> Review -> Referral -> Revenue -> Next Sale

components.proof_artifact: lead_registry_v1.json entries and client promotion report
components.integration_gap: Lead truth exists, but write origin and downstream propagation are not fully traced.
components.risk_if_ignored: Misrouted merchants and stale lead state.
components.risk_if_deleted: Loss of top-of-funnel truth and routing history.
components.next_verifiable_question: What code path writes lead_registry_v1.json, and does it preserve lifecycle stage and routing metadata?

components.proof_artifact: promotion report and qualified client entries
components.integration_gap: Qualification exists, but the primary merchant loop still shows routing gaps.
components.risk_if_ignored: Qualified leads remain uncaptured or misrouted.
components.risk_if_deleted: Lead-to-client promotion loses its decision basis.
components.next_verifiable_question: Does the qualification runner produce the same stage/result for the primary merchant as the runtime client record?

components.integration_gap: Routing exists, but selected product can still be absent on the primary client record.
components.risk_if_ignored: Commercial motion defaults to the wrong route.
components.risk_if_deleted: Loss of route selection truth.
components.next_verifiable_question: Where is selected_product persisted for cart-agent-dev.myshopify.com?

components.proof_artifact: client promotion report and registry record
components.integration_gap: Promotion writes clients, but the primary merchant still lacks a complete promoted product record.
components.risk_if_ignored: Qualified merchants remain outside operator truth.
components.risk_if_deleted: Loss of promotion history and client identity continuity.
components.next_verifiable_question: Does the promotion runner write all required client fields for the primary merchant, including selected product and next action?

components.event_that_changes_state: client promotion, payment, proof, or follow-up updates
components.integration_gap: Payment, packet, proof, and revenue fields are not fully synchronized.
components.risk_if_ignored: Operator truth diverges from actual business state.
components.risk_if_deleted: Loss of client continuity, route history, and next action context.
components.next_verifiable_question: Which runtime writer updates client payment and proof fields after verified Stripe payment?

components.event_that_changes_state: merchant audit request or scorecard generation
components.proof_artifact: audit authority fields and scorecard result
components.integration_gap: Public audit flow exists, but merchant-grade proof is still incomplete.
components.risk_if_ignored: Audit becomes a generic content surface instead of a conversion instrument.
components.risk_if_deleted: Loss of structured conversion evidence.
components.next_verifiable_question: Does the audit output include the authoritative friction, fix, and proof fields required by the audit authority?

read_path: offer routing rules and proposal artifacts
components.integration_gap: Offer exists, but proposal-to-payment is not yet a proven merchant loop.
components.risk_if_ignored: Proposals remain disconnected from revenue capture.
components.risk_if_deleted: Loss of commercial offer context.
components.next_verifiable_question: Is the canonical $950 Fix Sprint proposal emitted from the same authority used by the public page?

components.proof_artifact: canonical $950 offer visible on the page
components.integration_gap: Page exists and surfaces the canonical offer, but it is still only the front door.
components.risk_if_ignored: Visitor intent can drift to the wrong offer or route.
components.risk_if_deleted: Loss of merchant acquisition front door.
components.next_verifiable_question: Does the public ShopiFixer page route every purchase intent into the packet-aware checkout flow?

components.write_path: packet JSON creation and Stripe checkout session creation
components.downstream_dependency: Stripe Checkout Session and Packet Binding
components.proof_artifact: checkout code and packet metadata binding
components.integration_gap: Checkout exists and binds packet metadata, but end-to-end paid proof is still pending.
components.risk_if_ignored: Payments can be detached from merchant identity.
components.risk_if_deleted: No controlled way to start the payment loop.
components.next_verifiable_question: Does the public checkout create a packet with the same id that the webhook later resolves?

authority_source: Stripe checkout authority as embedded in runtime code
components.proof_artifact: session payload with client_reference_id and packet metadata
components.integration_gap: Session creation exists, but the session is not itself the business truth.
components.risk_if_ignored: Session identity can be mistaken for commercial completion.
components.risk_if_deleted: No payable handoff to Stripe.
components.next_verifiable_question: Does the created Stripe session always carry client_reference_id and metadata.packet_id?

components.proof_artifact: signature-verified webhook code and packet state mutation
components.integration_gap: Webhook verifies signature and can mark the packet received, but it stops at packet mutation.
components.risk_if_ignored: Unverified or partial payment handling can drift into production truth.
components.risk_if_deleted: Loss of the payment verification gate.
components.next_verifiable_question: Does the webhook mutate packet state only, or does it also update client and revenue truth?

components.integration_gap: The transition exists, but downstream propagation to client registry, revenue truth, dashboard, and CEO cockpit is missing.
components.risk_if_ignored: Payment can be recorded without becoming operator truth.
components.risk_if_deleted: The only payment state transition is lost.
components.next_verifiable_question: After a verified Stripe event, which runtime files change besides the packet JSON?

components.proof_artifact: packet object with packet_id and store_domain metadata
components.integration_gap: Packet creation exists and is bound to checkout metadata.
components.risk_if_ignored: Payment cannot be associated with the merchant loop.
components.risk_if_deleted: Breaks the packet-aware checkout path.
components.next_verifiable_question: Is the packet created with the same merchant and packet identifiers used by the webhook?

components.write_path: packet JSON and Stripe session metadata
components.proof_artifact: packet id persisted through checkout and webhook
components.integration_gap: Binding exists, but paid packet completion has not been proven end-to-end.
components.risk_if_ignored: Merchant identity can detach from payment state.
components.risk_if_deleted: Payment loop loses durable correlation.
components.next_verifiable_question: Does the packet survive the full checkout/webhook round trip without identity loss?

components.integration_gap: Scope authority exists, but a paid merchant packet has not been proven to enter execution cleanly.
components.risk_if_ignored: Paid work can start without a governed scope record.
components.risk_if_deleted: No authoritative scope for the sprint.
components.next_verifiable_question: Is fulfillment scope instantiated from a paid packet or only described in authority?

components.event_that_changes_state: source truth updates in underlying systems

components.business_lifecycle_step: Prevent invented claims and mixed-scope work

components.event_that_changes_state: artifact review or drift incident classification
components.integration_gap: Governance exists, but it is not yet fully absorbing runtime truth across every surface.
components.risk_if_ignored: Vibe code and invented claims can re-enter the tree.
components.risk_if_deleted: Loss of drift containment and audit trail.
